phrases.intent_en: Ask if a taxi is available now
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿hay un taxi disponible ahora?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿AH-ee oon TAHK-see dee-poh-nee-BLEH ah-OH-rah?

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, there is one free immediately.

responses.english: Yes, there is one free immediately.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the taxi stand is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la parada de taxis?
phrases.pronunciation: boo-EH-nohs DÍ-ahs DÓN-deh EHSTÁ LAH pah-RAH-dah DEH TAH-ksees

likely_response.local: Frente a la estación de tren, izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: FREHN-teh AH LAH eh-stah-thee-ÓN DEH TREHN eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: In front of the train station, on the left.

responses.english: In front of the train station, on the left.
responses.phonetic: FREHN-teh AH LAH eh-stah-thee-ÓN DEH TREHN eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.local: Frente a la estación de tren, izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if airport transfers can be booked
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿se pueden reservar traslados al aeropuerto?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, se PWEH-den re-ser-VAR tras-LA-dos al ah-ro-PWER-to?

likely_response.local: Sí, en ventanilla o llamando al 952 87 23 14.
likely_response.pronunciation: SÍ EHN behn-tah-NEEL-lah OH yah-MAHN-doh AHL
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, book in advance at the office.

responses.english: Yes, book in advance at the office.
responses.phonetic: SÍ EHN behn-tah-NEEL-lah OH yah-MAHN-doh AHL
responses.local: Sí, en ventanilla o llamando al 952 87 23 14.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to book a White Villages tour
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo reservo un tour por los Pueblos Blancos?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, KO-mo re-SER-vo oon toor por los PWEH-blos BLAHN-kos?

likely_response.local: Hable con el conductor para acordar ruta y precio.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHB-leh KOHN EHL kohn-dooth-TOHR PAH-rah ah-kohr-DAHR ROO-tah Y preh-THEE-oh
likely_response.translation_en: Speak with the driver to agree route and price.

responses.english: Speak with the driver to agree route and price.
responses.phonetic: AHB-leh KOHN EHL kohn-dooth-TOHR PAH-rah ah-kohr-DAHR ROO-tah Y preh-THEE-oh
responses.local: Hable con el conductor para acordar ruta y precio.
